plain_problem: Find a legitimate way to reach a target institution about a project.

branches.query: known people who may have relevant affiliation, experience, or advice
people known by trusted contacts who may know the institution
department email, public contact page, office hours, events, seminars
inventor, innovation, entrepreneurship, research, or open-call programs

pruning_rules: source must be enabled or public
candidate must stay within token budget
candidate must require user review before action
